text: ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Newly elected Hungarian Prime Minister Magyar said Ukraine is the victim in its war with Russia, adding that he cannot expect Ukraine to give up territory. "So everyone in Hungary knows that Ukraine is the victim of this war and that Ukraine, based on the Budapest Memorandum of 1994, it is the job of any Ukrainian government to protect this territorial integrity and sovereignty and no one should tell them that at the, hopefully at the end of a four-year war, what, under what conditions they should enter peace or sign a peace treaty. So we cannot say any country to give up their territory." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 新当选的匈牙利总理马扎尔表示，乌克兰是俄乌战争中的受害者，并补充说他不能指望乌克兰放弃领土。“所以匈牙利每个人都知道乌克兰是这场战争的受害者，根据1994年的《布达佩斯备忘录》，保护领土完整和主权是任何乌克兰政府的职责，没有人应该告诉他们，在四年战争结束后，他们应该在什么条件下实现和平或签署和平条约。所以我们不能要求任何国家放弃他们的领土。” @wfwitness

text: ❗️ Today marks the highest adaptation of FPVs by Hezbullah where they attacked 6 different locations Inshallah we have much more of these daily because the IDF is working in safe areas in the open and is a sitting duck. - Soldiers sleeping quarters in Yiftah base - Soldier staging area in Biet Hillel base - Soldiers sleeping quarters in Qiryat Shmona - Command room to manage firepower and military tent near Kfar Giladi artillery battery - Military room and tent in Kfar Giladi barracks - Military room and tent in Margaliot
text_zh: ❗️ 今天是真主党使用FPV无人机频率最高的一天，他们袭击了6个不同的地点。因沙安拉，我们每天都会有更多这样的行动，因为以色列国防军在开阔的安全区域活动，简直就是活靶子。- 耶夫塔赫基地的士兵宿舍 - 拜特希勒尔基地的士兵集结区 - 基里亚特什莫纳的士兵宿舍 - 卡法吉拉迪炮兵连附近的火力管理指挥室和军用帐篷 - 卡法吉拉迪军营的军事室和帐篷 - 马尔加利奥特的军事室和帐篷

He certainly wants it ended. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普谈到是否会再次派遣副总统万斯与伊朗谈判时说：‘嗯，他做得很好。史蒂夫和贾里德，他们都做得非常好。而且，我可以告诉你，我们接到了对方的电话。他们想……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 美国总统特朗普谈中国和习近平：……我们与中国的关系非常好。他也希望看到 [伊朗战争] 结束。他当然希望它结束。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump on Iran: Iran will not have a nuclear weapon... If they don't agree, there's no deal. There'll never be a deal. Iran will not have a nuclear weapon and we're going to get the dust back — either we'll get it back from them or…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump on if he would send Vice President Vance to negotiate with Iran again: "Well, he's done a good job. Steve and Jared, they've all done a very good job. And, I can tell you that we've been called by the other side. They'd like to make a deal very badly, very badly." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普谈伊朗：伊朗不会拥有核武器……如果他们不同意，就没有协议。永远不会有协议。伊朗不会拥有核武器，我们要把尘埃拿回来——我们要么从他们那里拿回来，要么……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普谈到是否会再次派遣副总统万斯与伊朗谈判时说：“嗯，他做得很好。史蒂夫和贾里德，他们都做得非常好。而且，我可以告诉你，我们接到了对方的电话。他们非常、非常渴望达成协议。” @wfwitness

text: Trump: Do you think men should play in women's sports? DoorDash worker: I really don't have an opinion on that.
text_zh: 特朗普：你认为男性应该参加女子体育比赛吗？DoorDash员工：我对此真的没有意见。

text: 📝 Important to note: Trump’s threats aren’t just directed at Iran; they target any country or ship that pays a toll to Iran to pass through the Strait of Hormuz. “No one who pays an illegal toll will have safe passage.” — Trump
text_zh: 📝 重要提示：特朗普的威胁不仅针对伊朗；它们针对任何向伊朗支付过路费以通过霍尔木兹海峡的国家或船只。“任何支付非法过路费的人都不会获得安全通行。”——特朗普

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇺🇸 Kan: Senior IDF officials have briefed Israel’s ambassador to the United States, Yechiel Leiter, ahead of his meetings with Lebanese ambassador Nada Hamada Maoued in Washington. The unusual briefing was requested by the ambassador and approved by…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Kan : A political source in the anti‑Hezbollah camp in Lebanon expressed pessimism ahead of Tuesday’s direct talks between Israeli and Lebanese ambassadors in Washington, saying progress will be difficult as long as Lebanon prioritises a ceasefire over disarming Hezbollah. Behind the scenes, a struggle is under way between Hezbollah’s Shia camp, which seeks only a ceasefire, and the opposing camp pushing for disarmament. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇺🇸 Kan：以色列国防军高级官员在以色列驻美国大使耶希尔·莱特与黎巴嫩大使娜达·哈马达·马乌德在华盛顿会晤前，向其进行了简报。这次不同寻常的简报是由大使要求的，并得到了……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Kan：黎巴嫩反真主党阵营的一位政治消息人士在周二以色列和黎巴嫩大使在华盛顿举行直接会谈前表示悲观，称只要黎巴嫩将停火置于解除真主党武装之上，进展将非常困难。在幕后，真主党的什叶派阵营（只寻求停火）与推动解除武装的反对派阵营之间正在进行一场斗争。 @wfwitness

text: Reporter: Did you post that picture of yourself depicted as Jesus Christ? Trump: I did post it, and I thought it was me as a doctor. It had to do with the Red Cross, as a Red Cross worker.
text_zh: 记者：你发布了那张把自己描绘成耶稣基督的照片吗？特朗普：我确实发布了，我以为那是我作为一名医生。它与红十字会有关，作为一名红十字会工作人员。

text: 🇺🇸 Trump says he won't apologize to Pope Leo XIV. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text_zh: 特朗普：我们信仰法律与秩序，而利奥教皇似乎对此有意见。没什么可道歉的；他错了。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸 President Trump on posting an image of himself depicted as Jesus Christ: I did post it, and I thought it was me as a doctor, and had to do with Red Cross, as a Red Cross worker there, which we support... It’s supposed to be me as a doctor, making people…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 U.S. President Trump on Cuba: Cuba has been a terribly run country for a long long time. It's got a bad system. It's been very oppressive, as you know. And we have a lot of great Cuban Americans, all of whom just about voted for me. And they were treated very badly. In many cases, family members have been killed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普谈到发布一张把自己描绘成耶稣基督的图片：我确实发布了，我以为那是我作为一名医生，这与红十字会有关，作为那里的红十字会工作人员，我们支持……它本应该是作为医生的我，让人们……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 美国总统特朗普谈古巴：古巴长期以来一直是一个治理极其糟糕的国家。它的体制很糟糕。如你所知，它一直非常压迫。我们有很多伟大的古巴裔美国人，他们几乎都投票给了我。他们受到了非常糟糕的对待。在许多情况下，家庭成员被杀害。 @wfwitness

text: Trump: We may stop by Cuba after we’re finished with Iran.
text_zh: 特朗普：处理完伊朗后，我们可能会顺道去趟古巴。

text: An army? No a police force Downgrade to a police force and free up the budget. That's the most you could live up for
text_zh: 军队？不，是一支警察部队。降级为警察部队并腾出预算。这是你能做到的极限了

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ REPORTER: Did you post that picture of yourself depicted as Jesus Christ? TRUMP: I did post it and I thought it was me as a doctor
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ResistanceTrench 镜像：🇺🇸 ⚡️ 记者：你发布了那张把自己描绘成耶稣基督的照片吗？特朗普：我确实发布了，我以为那是我作为一名医生

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ REPORTER: Did you post that picture of yourself depicted as Jesus Christ? TRUMP: I did post it and I thought it was me as a doctor
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 记者：你发布了那张把自己描绘成耶稣基督的照片吗？特朗普：我确实发布了，我以为那是我作为一名医生

text: Trump: We have a blockade. They’re doing no business. Iran is doing absolutely no business — and we’re going to keep it that way. There’s no fighting right now.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们实施了封锁。他们没有任何生意。伊朗绝对没有任何生意可做——我们将保持这种状态。目前没有战斗。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 Israeli Channel 14: Israel is making preparations for an immediate renewal of the war with Iran. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Kan : Israel assesses that the United States and Iran are closer to renewed fighting than to an agreement, after the Americans briefed Israel that the gaps in negotiations remain significant. Nevertheless, an Israeli source said the possibility of a deal has not been completely closed. Iran’s new defence minister said the Islamic Republic is ready for any scenario and will respond “strongly and forcefully, making enemies regret any aggression”. Pakistan’s defence minister expressed hope that talks will resume, saying the previous round was “pleasant” and that there are still chances for another diplomatic initiative. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 以色列第14频道：以色列正在为与伊朗立即重启战争做准备。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Kan：以色列评估称，在美国告知以色列谈判差距依然巨大后，美国和伊朗比达成协议更接近重启战斗。尽管如此，一位以色列消息人士称，达成协议的可能性并未完全关闭。伊朗新任国防部长表示，伊斯兰共和国已为任何情况做好准备，并将“强有力地”做出回应，让敌人为任何侵略行为感到后悔。巴基斯坦国防部长表示希望会谈能够恢复，称上一轮会谈“令人愉快”，并且仍有进行另一次外交倡议的机会。 @wfwitness

text: Trump says he won’t apologize to Pope Leo: I won’t apologize. Pope Leo said things that are wrong. I think Pope Leo is very weak on crime.
text_zh: 特朗普表示他不会向利奥教皇道歉：我不会道歉。利奥教皇说的话是错的。我认为利奥教皇在打击犯罪方面非常软弱。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump on Iran's amibitions: "Iran is a, wants to be a nuclear nation. So they can exterminate the world. Not gonna happen." @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 President Trump on posting an image of himself depicted as Jesus Christ: I did post it, and I thought it was me as a doctor, and had to do with Red Cross, as a Red Cross worker there, which we support... It’s supposed to be me as a doctor, making people better. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普谈伊朗的野心：‘伊朗是一个，想要成为一个核国家。这样他们就可以消灭世界。这不会发生。’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普谈到发布一张把自己描绘成耶稣基督的图片：我确实发布了，我以为那是我作为一名医生，这与红十字会有关，作为那里的红十字会工作人员，我们支持……它本应该是作为医生的我，让人们变得更好。 @wfwitness

text: Trump says he won’t apologize to Pope Leo: I won’t apologize. Pope Leo said things that are wrong. I think Pope Leo is very weak on crime.
text_zh: 特朗普表示他不会向利奥教皇道歉：我不会道歉。利奥教皇说的话是错的。我认为利奥教皇在打击犯罪方面非常软弱。

text: Trump: We’ve been called this morning — by the right people, the appropriate people — and they want to work a deal. They would like to work a deal.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们今天早上接到了电话——由合适的人，相关的人打来的——他们想达成协议。他们想达成协议。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump on the Strait of Hormuz U.S. blockade: Reporter: "Has the blockade started, sir? Trump: "Yeah. Started 10:00." @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump on Iran's amibitions: "Iran is a, wants to be a nuclear nation. So they can exterminate the world. Not gonna happen." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普谈霍尔木兹海峡美国封锁：记者：‘先生，封锁开始了吗？’ 特朗普：‘是的。10点开始。’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普谈伊朗的野心：‘伊朗是一个，想要成为一个核国家。这样他们就可以消灭世界。这不会发生。’ @wfwitness
